narrative:
Lima 2A (precinct in Allen County) has 969 registered voters, with 63.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points.
